## Header

**Name:** Layla Al-Rashid
**Headline:** CEO at Acme-MENATech | Building the CRM the Gulf actually needed | Ex-Cisco, Ex-Avaya
**Location:** Dubai, United Arab Emirates
**Connections:** 8,400+

## About

I spent twelve years inside the world's biggest enterprise tech vendors, deploying CRMs across MENA. I watched brilliant Gulf sales teams fight tools built in San Francisco for buyers in San Francisco. The mismatch was costing us deals.

In 2024, I left to build Acme-MENATech. We are the AI-native CRM purpose-built for how MENA sells: WhatsApp-first, Arabic-native, priced for our market. 200+ businesses have switched in our first 18 months.

This is not a localization play. This is a re-architecture for our region.

If you run an SME in the Gulf and your CRM frustrates your team daily, let us talk.

## Experience

### CEO and Founder, Acme-MENATech (Jan 2024 - Present)
Built the AI-native CRM for MENA SMEs. WhatsApp-native messaging. Arabic-first UX. 200+ paying customers across UAE, KSA, Qatar, Kuwait. Featured in Khaleej Times.

### Regional Sales Director MENA, Avaya (2018 - 2023)
Led enterprise sales across UAE, KSA, Egypt. Closed largest contact center deal in company's MENA history (Saudi government, USD 14M ATR). Managed team of 22.

### Senior Account Manager, Cisco Systems (2011 - 2018)
Started in Dubai office. Promoted twice. Specialized in financial services vertical across GCC. Top performer 2015 and 2017.

### Sales Engineer, Cisco Systems (2009 - 2011)
Started career in Riyadh. Pre-sales technical role.

## Education

- Stanford GSB MBA, 2011
- AUB BSc Computer Engineering, 2009

## Skills

Enterprise Sales, MENA Markets, B2B SaaS, GTM Strategy, Arabic Business Communication, CRM Architecture, Channel Sales, Government Procurement (KSA + UAE)
